calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Dahm, Esq. 415-989-4730 of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC for Plaintiff.
No other Appearances.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Plaintiff Birite Restaurant Supply, Inc.'s application for a right to attach order and a writ of attachment as to defendants Thistle Health, Inc. and Ashwin Cheriyan is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
